findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13-27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025-28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract the full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012 using higher OCR resolution or manual verification to capture all transactions from 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026. Prioritize obtaining complete date, description, debit/credit amount, and running balance for each transaction.
proposed_tasks.title: Full transaction list extraction with improved OCR

summary: Prior extraction of NAP-SRC-0012 captured only ~6k of ~27k tokens, covering 13-27 April 2026. The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period (Sep 2025-Apr 2026) is missing. This task proposes a follow-up extraction to obtain the complete set of debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances.

uncertainties.text: Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.
